text:
The Decepticons is a fictional organization from the ' series. 

Transformers Mode "EVA"

At some point Galvatron kills Starscream in the "Unicron Wars," and his ghost drifted into space where Starscream posseses an Angel and become the amalgamation Angel-Scream.

After Optimus Prime defeats Angel-Scream the Autobots and NERV Unite as Autobot-NERV to fight against Decepticons and Angels alike.

List of members

Galvatron (Leader)
Starscream
